refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics
Traceable data storage schema for performance requirements
Version-controlled management system for baseline and calibration updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, traceable storage, and version-controlled management

potential_sources: Data dependencies between derivation and storage
Update propagation between management and recording
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize coupling across modules and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of complexity in managing version control and traceability coherently
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity during implementation; consider modularizing if coupling grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this functionality is core to NGHE software; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has limited relevance; high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation is focused on control, not performance requirement management.
Safety Services unrelated to performance requirement derivation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning to NGHE Solution centralizes performance requirement logic and data, minimizing diffusion and supporting traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution if too many responsibilities accumulate
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be well managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface contracts and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical cohesion and traceability.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized assignment in NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution implementation module.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity within NGHE Solution to avoid overloading the module
Validate interface definitions with Telemetry and Network Link teams

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting containment and coupling criteria. Verification and ownership are well defined.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Current level meets all criteria; no revision needed at this stage.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated functionality without excessive complexity
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution may require future modularization
Interface dependencies must be managed to avoid integration issues
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability and history management in NGHE Solution
Interface validation with Telemetry and Network Link modules
